title: Daily Logic: Sudoku & More
subtitle: 5 daily puzzles & streaks
promotionalText: Five fresh logic puzzles every day — the same for everyone, everywhere. Keep your streak alive!
description:
Daily Logic serves five hand-tuned logic puzzles every day — Sudoku, Killer Sudoku, Nonogram (Picross), Kakuro and Binairo — identical for every player worldwide.

ONE DAILY RITUAL
• A new board of each type at midnight UTC
• Difficulty follows the week: easy Mon–Tue, medium Wed–Fri, hard weekends
• Every puzzle has exactly one solution, guaranteed by the generator

KEEP YOUR STREAK
• Per-puzzle streaks plus a perfect-day streak for finishing all five
• Best times, averages and a 12-week completion calendar
• Spoiler-free emoji share cards — brag without ruining the puzzle

MADE FOR PHONES
• Pencil marks, undo/redo, error checking, three daily hints
• Satisfying wins with confetti and haptics
• Fully offline — play on the plane, scores sync to your device
• No account, no ads, no tracking

Play today's five. Tomorrow brings five more.
